title: Goal-Progress Strategy Resolution

story.iWant: to resolve a measurement strategy for every Goal based on its shape (type / ref pattern / hasContentSpec / isAssessmentTarget)
story.soThat: trackGoalProgress dispatches to the right per-call calculator (skill_ema | lo_rollup | assessment_readiness | connect_warmth_avg | manual_only) instead of a hardcoded if/else, and unmeasurable goals stay at 0 with an 'awaiting evidence' affordance instead of drifting up on engagement noise

context.applies: (1) At goal-creation time in apply-projection.ts (authored) and instantiate-goals.ts (non-authored). (2) At goal-progress time in trackGoalProgress (lookup once per pipeline run, pass down).
assumptions: Goal.progressStrategy column has been added (#444 migration).
Authored courses (COURSE_REFERENCE projection) set progressStrategy directly per goal type at projection time — the spec is a fallback only.
Non-authored goals (caller-expressed via extractGoals, hand-seeded via Playbook.config.goals[*]) fall through to spec-rule resolution.
If no rule matches, the goal defaults to manual_only (progress stays 0, banner shows 'awaiting evidence' / 'attach a SKILL or LO to make measurable').

parameters.name: Strategy Resolution Rules
parameters.description: Ordered list of {match, strategy} rules. First match (highest priority) wins. If none match, default = manual_only.

rules.rationale: Per-skill ACHIEVE goals (#417) measured by SKILL-AGG-001 EMA → CallerTarget.currentScore → tier band via scoreToTier.
LEARN goals tagged to a learning objective ref — derive mastery from accumulated LO scores across modules (#414).
Assessment goals (e.g. 'IELTS Band 7') with a contentSpec for the rubric — computeExamReadiness against module coverage + score thresholds.
CONNECT goals (rapport / trust) measured by avg(warmth, empathy, insight) parameter scores. Param keys + bump thresholds come from this rule's config block, NOT hardcoded.

notes: This spec is consumed by lib/goals/strategies/resolve-strategy.ts. ContractRegistry-cached (30s TTL). Loaded ONCE at the top of trackGoalProgress and instantiate-goals; never re-fetched per goal.

Strategy keys are deliberately free-text strings (not enum) so we can ship new strategies (e.g. composite_measure) by registering a new file under lib/goals/strategies/* and adding a rule here — no schema migration required.
Authored courses (apply-projection.ts) write progressStrategy directly per goal type. They do not consult this spec at projection time; the spec is the fallback path for non-authored goals.

validateCourseStrategies(playbookId) — wizard readiness check — refuses to mark a course Ready while any Goal has progressStrategy=NULL. Resolution via this spec at instantiate-goals time guarantees every non-authored goal gets a value.

manual_only is the deliberate-not-measured terminal state. Used for caller-expressed ACHIEVE / CHANGE / SUPPORT / CREATE goals that have no ref and no contentSpec. UI must render the 'awaiting evidence — attach a SKILL or LO' banner for these (no engagement-heuristic fallback).
